summary: Project with milestones and tasks UI where milestones should be added via a plus sign (like tasks) rather than one per line.

existing_features.title: Replace the one-per-line milestone input fields with a plus sign button interaction pattern that matches how tasks are added: display a text input field with a '+' or 'Add' button that appends a new milestone to the list on click, instead of rendering one input row per milestone by default.

new_feature_requests.summary: Milestones should be added via a plus sign button (like tasks) instead of one per line input

projectName: Change milestone input to use plus sign button like tasks
